data.title: Deloitte India partners with Embark to support Global Capability Centres, aiding global firms in India.
data.description: In Bengaluru, India on August 8, 2025, Deloitte India revealed a new partnership with Embark, a unified platform for Global Capability Centres (GCCs). This collaboration aims to provide extensive assistance to international companies in setting up and expanding their GCCs in India. Through this alliance, a wide range of services will be offered...

data.title: Tempus AI to release Q2 earnings on Aug 8. Analysts predict net loss of 25 cents/share and revenue of $297.76 million. gained 5.8%, closing at $58.74.
data.description: Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM) is scheduled to unveil its Q2 earnings before the market opens on Friday, August 8th. Analysts are predicting a net loss of 25 cents per share for the Chicago-based company, as opposed to a loss of 63 cents per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is projected to be approximately $297.76 million, marking a substantial increase from $165.97 million reported in the previous year. Noteworthy to mention, on July 16, Tempus AI secured 510(k) clearance from the FDA for its ejection fraction software. Following this news, Tempus AI's stock saw a 5.8% rise, closing at $58.74 on Thursday. For further information, readers can refer to the detailed story on their website.

data.title: Largest shareholder of Core Scientific opposes $9B buyout by CoreWeave, citing undervaluation and risk for investors.
data.description: The biggest shareholder of Core Scientific, Two Seas Capital, has decided to oppose CoreWeave's proposed buyout worth $9 billion. They believe the deal undervalues the company and poses significant risks for investors.

data.title: Bitcoin's long-term growth potential doubted as trader suggests many wouldn't hold through -10 corrections over a decade.
data.description: According to a cryptocurrency trader, individuals who invested in Bitcoin at the early stages most likely would not have had the determination to retain their holdings for more than ten years despite the numerous significant market downturns experienced during that time.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation vows $500K matching funds for Roman Storm's legal defense against revived charges risking decades in prison.
data.description: Roman Storm, a co-founder of Tornado Cash, is potentially facing several decades in prison if prosecutors decide to retry the deadlocked charges in a well-known case.

data.title: Bitcoin rises as Trump nominates Bitcoin-friendly economist for Fed, signaling looser policy; critics fear independence risks.
data.description: The nomination of a pro-Bitcoin economist by Trump is viewed as a move towards more relaxed policies. This decision has sparked concerns as it may undermine the independence of the bank. The economist's stance on Bitcoin suggests potential changes in the financial approach. Despite this, there are contrasting opinions on how this may impact the overall financial landscape.

data.title: Winklevoss twins invest in American Bitcoin, co-founded by Trump sons, with an undisclosed amount.
data.description: Two brothers have made an investment in American Bitcoin, a mining company co-founded by two of former President Trump's sons and other individuals. The specific amount of this investment remains undisclosed.

data.title: Trader believes holding Bitcoin for over a decade wouldn't have made early investors rich due to sharp corrections.
data.description: According to a crypto trader, individuals who invested in Bitcoin early on probably would not have the confidence to retain the cryptocurrency for more than ten years despite its significant price fluctuations.

data.title: President Trump plans to penalize financial institutions for 'debanking' digital asset firms, amid attempts to block applications.
data.description: In response to a group of bank associations attempting to block applications from four digital asset firms, Trump has issued an executive order. This order aims to address the issue and prevent any potential disruptions in the banking sector. This move comes amidst growing concerns about the impact of digital assets on traditional banking systems. The number of firms affected by the block stands at four, with the executive order serving as a response to the attempts made by the bank associations.

data.title: RaySearch Labs Q2 2025: Order intake SEK 241.2 M, Net sales SEK 304.9 M, Operating profit SEK 36.4 M, Profit after tax SEK 30.8 M.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, the order intake in April to June totaled SEK 241.2 million, a decrease from the previous period. Net sales for the same period amounted to SEK 304.9 million, with a slight drop from the previous quarter. The operating profit was SEK 36.4 million, showing a decrease compared to the previous months. The profit after tax was SEK 30.8 million, also lower than the previous quarter. Further details on earnings per share were unavailable at this time.

data.title: UK's Union Jack Oil aims to convert stranded gas into Bitcoin, generating revenue and potentially establishing a corporate Bitcoin treasury.
data.description: Union Jack Oil has revealed a new strategy to repurpose stalled gas wells for Bitcoin mining, aiming to generate early cash flow. This move could lead to the establishment of one of the UK’s initial corporate Bitcoin treasuries.
